# Autonomous Incident Diagnosis & Resolution Agent

## Problem

SRE teams spend significant time manually analyzing alerts, logs, and metrics.

## Solution

AI Agent powered by:

- AMD Instinct MI300X

- ROCm

- vLLM

- Qwen3-4B

## Features

- Incident Classification

- Root Cause Analysis

- Remediation Recommendation

- Human Approval Workflow

- Incident Report Generation

## Supported Incidents

- CPU Spike

- Memory Leak

- Disk Full

- Pod CrashLoop

- DB Connection Failure

- Network Latency

- Deployment Regression

## Demo

python agent.py
